title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
